layout_rules: Left rail navigation across all pages.
Top KPI strip on executive page.
White chart panels on cool neutral canvas.
Green/amber/coral action states for scale, optimize, and review/cut.
Charts above detail tables; action tables at the bottom.

pages.name: Executive Overview
pages.hero: Portfolio ROI, paid vs organic value, and spend-vs-ROAS action map.
pages.primary_question: Which channels are worth scaling and which are burning budget?

pages.name: Channel ROI
pages.hero: ROAS/CAC target gaps and channel scorecard.
pages.primary_question: Which channels beat target efficiency and which need intervention?

pages.name: Campaign Ranking
pages.primary_question: Which campaigns should get more or less budget next month?

pages.name: Exceptions and Actions
pages.hero: Budget action matrix and operating table.
pages.primary_question: What should the growth team do after reading the dashboard?
